response: Stay refreshed on every adventure with our double-wall, vacuum-insulated stainless-steel water bottle, engineered to keep drinks icy cold for 24 hours or soothingly hot for 12. The leak-proof, one-hand flip lid and grippy powder-coat finish make it effortless to hydrate whether you’re at the gym, on the trail, or commuting. BPA-free, dishwasher safe, and available in vibrant, fade-resistant colors, it’s the durable bottle that goes wherever life takes you.
